name: Zetian
intro: Zetian, the Celestial Empress, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Celestial Armament
abilities.description: Shield CC Phoenix Crown : When Zetian hits enemy heroes with Phoenix Strike or Phoenix Descent , she gains 0.5% Spell Vamp for 5s, stacking up to 10 times. Celestial Robe : The power of the Phoenix periodically protects Zetian, knocking back and stunning any enemy hero who dares approach her while dealing 90 (+10*Hero Level) (+50% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to them. She also gains a 300 (+20*Hero Level) (+50% Total Magic Power) Shield that lasts 3s. This effect has a 120s cooldown.

abilities.name: Phoenix Strike
abilities.description: Damage Speed Up | Spell Vamp Ratio: 100% Zetian unleashes a Phoenix Wave in the target direction. If it hits an enemy, she automatically casts another wave, up to 3 times. While casting, Zetian can move with 10% increased Movement Speed and can use other skills. The three Phoenix Waves deal 185 (+30% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage /185 (+50% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage /330 (+70% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage , respectively. The third wave hits a larger area and includes a small pull effect (not considered a control effect). This skill only has 80% Spell Vamp efficiency against Minions.

abilities.name: Phoenix Descent
abilities.description: Slow Debuff | Spell Vamp Ratio: 50% Zetian summons a Phoenix Spirit at the target location, dealing 150 (+30% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and applying a 50% Slow Effect to enemies in the area. The Phoenix Spirit hovers at the location for 3s, dealing 20 (+10% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage every 0.5s and reducing enemies' Magic Defense by 10%. While the Phoenix Spirit is active, Zetian can use this skill again to command it to charge toward a designated location, dealing 150 (+30% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and applying a <%Num8> Slow Effect upon arrival.

abilities.name: Fury of the Phoenix
abilities.description: CC Damage | Spell Vamp Ratio: 50% Zetian calls upon her divine mandate and the hearts of her people, granting all allied heroes 60% Movement Speed that gradually decays over 3s, while bringing divine retribution upon all enemy heroes, dealing 400 (+100% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and stunning them for 1s. Zetian gains vision of all enemy heroes during this time. Zetian can cast other skills while channeling this skill.
